body:
## JIRA [BCIN-7543](https://strategyagile.atlassian.net/browse/BCIN-7543) ## Description Design doc: https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/~yuanli/pages/5728862732/Report+error+-+revert+instance Server PR: mstr-kiai/server#10905 ## Root Cause For both authoring mode and consumption mode. ## Fix/Solution Discussion ### Risk introduced by the fix - [ ] Low - [ ] Medium - [ ] High ### Self Test ⚠ - [ ] I have run Acceptance Test for my changes. Reference: [Pre-merge Checklist](https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TTAWC/pages/3099232802/Pre-Merge+Checklist) - [ ] I have run Regression CI for my changes, `automated-full-regression-tests` or `automated-feature-regression-tests` - Please provide the link to the corresponding e2e test reporter - [ ] This change is related to AI workflow and I have run AI data whisperer pre-merge CI (Comment `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-datawhisper-premerge-tests` to trigger the test), please list the test result - [ ] This change is related to custom applications and I have run custom app pre-merge CI (Comment `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-customapp-premerge-tests` to trigger the test), please list the test result - [ ] This change is related to share with acl and I have run share with acl pre-merge CI (Comment `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-sharewithacl-premerge-tests` to trigger the test), please list the test result - [ ] This change is related to aibot and I have run aibot pre-merge CI (Comment `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-ai-chatbot-system-test` to trigger the test), please list the test result - [ ] This change is related to auto data model and I have run auto data model pre-merge CI (Comment `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-auto-data-model-premerge-system-test` to trigger the test), please list the test result - [ ] This change may impact performance and I have run performance pre-merge CI (Comment `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-performance-system-test` to trigger the test), please list the test result - [ ] This change is related to embeded-bi-sdk and I have run embeded-bi-sdk pre-merge CI (Comment `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-premerge-system-test-embeding-sdk` to trigger the test), please list the test result ## Test Suggestions Please list the affected scenarios and components here, and give test suggestions to SETs. ⚠ You should also list your self test cases(if any) here since SET also need them. ## If this is a HotFix/Patch Branch PR
Click to expand The PR is to merge code change of DE-XYZ (tracked by PR #98765) from source_branch to 11.5.x Update branch. - [ ] **Project to compile** web-dossier - [ ] **Files to deliver** MicroStrategyLibrary.war
## CI Job Helper
Click to expand - [Troubleshooting of the CI Jobs when failing](https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TTAWC/pages/3543863228/web-dossier+Pre-Merge+CI+Guideline#Troubleshooting-of-the-CI-Jobs-when-failing) - [How to re-trigger the CI automation jobs](https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TTAWC/pages/3543863228/web-dossier+Pre-Merge+CI+Guideline#5.-Re-trigger-the-CI-jobs) - [CI automation job environments info](https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TTAWC/pages/3543863228/web-dossier+Pre-Merge+CI+Guideline#3.1-I-Server-Connection-information-for-each-job-(DO-NOT-MODIFY-object-in-the-environment))
### Run manually triggered CI pipelines/automations - Run Library full regression(900+ cases): `automated-full-regression-tests` - Run Library regression related to features: `automated-feature-regression-tests: {feature1,feature2}` - Get friendly recipe for all features: `automated-feature-regression-tests-recipe`. - Run Library regression related to test cases: `automated-testcase-regression-tests: {tc1,tc2}` - AI data whisperer pre-merge CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-datawhisper-premerge-tests` - custom app pre-merge CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-customapp-premerge-tests` - share with ACL pre-merge CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-sharewithacl-premerge-tests` - automated-bundle-diff: `automated-bundle-diff` - AI bot pre-merge CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-ai-chatbot-system-test` - AI bot full regression CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-ai-chatbot-system-test $premerge-regression-aibot-CI` - Auto answer full regression CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-ai-chatbot-system-test $premerge-regression-autoanswer-CI` - AI bot and auto answer full regression CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-ai-chatbot-system-test $premerge-regression-allAI-CI` - Bot2.0 pre-merge CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-ai-chatbot-system-test $premerge-ab2-CI` - Performance pre-merge CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-performance-system-test` - embeded-bi-sdk pre-merge CI: `web-dossier-m2021-stage-0-premerge-system-test-embeding-sdk` -
manual configuration needed features for regression CI - [How to Turn On Feature Flag](https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TTAWC/pages/4018245367/How+to+Turn+On+Feature+Flag) - `automated-feature-regression-tests: {ReportViewFilter,DossierLinkingPassIncanvasSelector}`

commits.messageHeadline: report authoring answer prompt error back to prompt again
BCIN-7543; Update error string, remove "Send Email" button
BCIN-7543; Add unit test to improve test coverage

title: BCIN-7543; Improve the report error handling
